Now with Health Connect integration

Healthcare that knows
your body

VitaConnect syncs your wearable health data via Android Health Connect, connects you with specialist doctors in minutes, and keeps your entire medical history in one secure place.

Consultations

<2 min

Avg. Wait Time

Everything you need, connected

A complete telemedicine platform built for Android with Health Connect at its core.

Instant Video Consults

Connect with board-certified doctors in under 2 minutes, 24/7.

Real-Time Health Sync

Automatic sync from Health Connect — wearables, glucometers, BP monitors.

HIPAA-Compliant

End-to-end encrypted consultations and medical records. Your data is yours.

Works Offline

PWA + TWA architecture. Access your health records even without internet.

Smart Health Alerts

AI-powered anomaly detection flags abnormal readings and notifies your doctor.

300+ Specialists

Cardiologists, endocrinologists, GPs, dermatologists and more.

Android Health Connect

Your wearables, finally useful

Automatically sync heart rate, blood pressure, sleep data, glucose readings and more from any Health Connect-compatible device directly to your care team.

❤️ Heart Rate🩸 Blood Pressure💤 Sleep👟 Steps🌡️ Temperature🫁 SpO2🍬 Glucose⚖️ Weight
Connect Health Data
